raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/XXXX I paid {$420.00} to XXXX for XXXXXXXX XXXX work for my dog. This was to be provided within XXXX weeks, then a follow up visit would be conducted so a XXXX XXXX could be established for my dog. XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX on XX/XX/XXXX, but no XXXX XXXX was received and as a result no follow up visit was performed. I attempted multiple times to obtain the services I paid for. Once it became clear that I would not receive the services, I asked for a refund. That was also not given. I then filed a dispute with American Express stating that I did not receive the services. A digital reprint of a receipt was provided where I used my Amex to pay {$420.00} on XX/XX/XXXX ( which making the payment was never part of the dispute ) and a copy of XXXX XXXX XXXX policy. No proof was ever provided that I received the services that I paid for, yet American Express allowed this charge to stand and stated that I am responsible for the charge. Simply put, I paid money to XXXX XXXX American Express for services they never provided I have spoken to multiple agents from American Express who are allowing the fraud against me to take place and are failing to protect me from fraudulent business practices by XXXX
